minimum_invariants: checkpoint records are JSON objects and written atomically
resume is allowed only from status INTERRUPTED
resume packet thread_id must match checkpoint thread_id
resume payload must be JSON object
external/chat text is never authoritative resume state
new resume creates a child checkpoint instead of rewriting parent
THREAD_LATEST is updated only after child checkpoint write succeeds

model.parent_checkpoint_id: previous checkpoint hash-chain link or null

purpose: Minimum artifact-backed checkpoint/replay contract for interrupted or resumable governed stages.
